title: Oscillatory Motion
description: Interactive installation with three custom-built robots.
longDescription: Design of three robots' structures, drive trains and various other components using OpenSCAD / Structural parts machining on a CNC using Fusion360 / Drive train and other parts design and 3d printing / E-bike like lithium battery pack custom design / Motor control and sensor data collection using two Arduinos / Sensors' data interpretation, path planning and sound playback in MaxMSP running on a miniPC on each robot.
